CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, value) VALUES (1, 'abc');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, value) VALUES (2, '');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, value) VALUES (3, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, value) VALUES (4, 'abcdef123456');
SELECT bif:md5(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT bif:md5(value) AS md5_hash FROM test_strings WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t.id, bif:md5(t.value) AS md5_hash FROM test_strings t WHERE t.value <> '';
CREATE TABLE more_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content TEXT);
INSERT INTO more_strings (id, content) VALUES (1, 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet');
INSERT INTO more_strings (id, content) VALUES (2, 'The quick brown fox');
SELECT b.id, bif:md5(b.content) FROM more_strings b WHERE b.id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4);
SELECT bif:md5(concat(ts.value, ms.content)) FROM test_strings ts, more_strings ms WHERE ts.id = 1 AND ms.id = 2;
CREATE TABLE nested_example (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description VARCHAR(500));
INSERT INTO nested_example (id, description) VALUES (1, 'Nesting with bif:md5');
SELECT bif:md5((SELECT description FROM nested_example WHERE id = 1)) AS nested_md5;
SELECT bif:md5(t.value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2) t;
SELECT bif:md5(b.value) FROM test_strings a JOIN more_strings b ON bif:md5(a.value) = bif:md5(b.content);
SELECT bif:md5(COALESCE(value, 'default')) FROM test_strings;
SELECT bif:md5(SUBSTRING(value FROM 1 FOR 100)) FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(value) > 100;
